overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dark gothic castle or citadel at night. The environment features historic stone architecture illuminated by warm torchlight against a cool blue night sky, with the character navigating through narrow corridors, open courtyards, and up stone staircases.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with torch lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark narrow stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches

notable_agents.action: sitting near a torch against the corridor wall

entered.detail: tall stone walls forming a narrow passage
wall-mounted iron torch holder with orange flame
irregular stone paving on the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed stone corridor with high walls on both sides. The path is lit by warm torchlight against the dark blue night. An NPC sits near a torch on the right side as the character walks forward through the cobblestone passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle courtyard under night sky

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open courtyard with visible night sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the open courtyard toward a building entrance with stone stairs

entered.detail: dark blue night sky with clouds visible above the courtyard
gothic stone facade with arched windows
wide stone staircase leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide courtyard under the night sky, revealing gothic stone buildings surrounding the area. The character walks across the cobblestone toward a stone staircase leading to a building entrance, with torchlight providing warm accents against the cool moonlit environment.

events.description: enters covered building interior with tall stone columns

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered colonnade between rows of stone columns

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone pillar supporting the roof structure
arched stone doorway leading deeper into the structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered colonnade area with tall stone columns lining the path. The sky is no longer visible, replaced by a dark ceiling overhead. The floor transitions to smooth marble tiles as the character walks between the pillars toward an interior archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand courtyard with monumental stairs under moonlight

events.description: exits covered area into large open courtyard with full moon visible

agents.ego_description: walking up a grand stone staircase toward an archway, with the moon visible overhead

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the bottom of the stairs holding a torch

entered.detail: large open plaza with clear view of the night sky
bright full moon visible through clouds in the dark blue sky
ornate stone balustrade along the edge of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a grand open courtyard bathed in moonlight, with the full moon prominently visible in the sky. The scene features a wide stone staircase leading upward, flanked by ornate railings. An NPC guard stands near the stairs holding a torch as the character begins to ascend toward a distant archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow balcony passage with stone archways

events.description: passes through stone archway into narrow balcony passage

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow stone archway and along a balcony passage with railings

notable_agents.action: sitting near the archway entrance with a torch

entered.detail: large gothic stone arch forming the passage entrance
constricted walkway with walls on both sides
elevated walkway with stone balustrade overlooking lower level

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a large stone archway into a narrow balcony passage. The space becomes enclosed again with stone walls and railings visible. An NPC sits near the entrance as the character continues along the elevated walkway, with only partial sky visibility overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a claustrophobic stone corridor through expansive moonlit courtyards and back into an elevated balcony passage. It begins in a narrow cobblestone passage lit by warm torches, passing a seated NPC before the space opens into a wide courtyard surrounded by gothic stone buildings. As the character moves toward a building entrance, the scene shifts into a semi-covered colonnade where the night sky vanishes behind a dark ceiling and the floor transitions to smooth marble tiles. The camera then emerges from the pillars into a grand open courtyard bathed in bright moonlight, passing a torch-bearing guard to ascend a wide stone staircase. Finally, the path leads through a large archway and back into an enclosed balcony passage, where the character walks along an elevated walkway beside another seated NPC.
